chapters.zh: 耶稣基督的使徒彼得写信给那分散在本都、加拉太、加帕多家、亚西亚、庇推尼寄居的，
chapters.en: Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ, to the strangers scattered throughout Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia,

chapters.zh: 就是照父神的先见被拣选，藉著圣灵得成圣洁，以致顺服耶稣基督，又蒙他血所洒的人。愿恩惠、平安多多的加给你们。
chapters.en: Elect according to the foreknowledge of God the Father, through sanctification of the Spirit, unto obedience and sprinkling of the blood of Jesus Christ: Grace unto you, and peace, be multiplied.

chapters.zh: 愿颂赞归与我们主耶稣基督的父神！他曾照自己的大怜悯，藉耶稣基督从死里复活，重生了我们，叫我们有活泼的盼望，
chapters.en: Blessed the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, which according to his abundant mercy hath begotten us again unto a lively hope by the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,

chapters.zh: 可以得著不能朽坏、不能玷污、不能衰残、为你们存留在天上的基业。
chapters.en: To an inheritance incorruptible, and undefiled, and that fadeth not away, reserved in heaven for you,

chapters.zh: 你们这因信蒙神能力保守的人，必能得著所预备、到末世要显现的救恩。
chapters.en: Who are kept by the power of God through faith unto salvation ready to be revealed in the last time.

chapters.zh: 因此，你们是大有喜乐；但如今，在百般的试炼中暂时忧愁，
chapters.en: Wherein ye greatly rejoice, though now for a season, if need be, ye are in heaviness through manifold temptations:

chapters.zh: 叫你们的信心既被试验，就比那被火试验仍然能坏的金子更显宝贵，可以在耶稣基督显现的时候得著称赞、荣耀、尊贵。
chapters.en: That the trial of your faith, being much more precious than of gold that perisheth, though it be tried with fire, might be found unto praise and honour and glory at the appearing of Jesus Christ:

chapters.zh: 你们虽然没有见过他，却是爱他；如今虽不得看见，却因信他就有说不出来、满有荣光的大喜乐；
chapters.en: Whom having not seen, ye love; in whom, though now ye see not, yet believing, ye rejoice with joy unspeakable and full of glory:

chapters.zh: 并且得著你们信心的果效，就是灵魂的救恩。
chapters.en: Receiving the end of your faith, the salvation of souls.

chapters.zh: 论到这救恩，那预先说你们要得恩典的众先知早已详细的寻求考察，
chapters.en: Of which salvation the prophets have enquired and searched diligently, who prophesied of the grace unto you:

chapters.zh: 就是考察在他们心里基督的灵，预先证明基督受苦难，后来得荣耀，是指著甚么时候，并怎样的时候。
chapters.en: Searching what, or what manner of time the Spirit of Christ which was in them did signify, when it testified beforehand the sufferings of Christ, and the glory that should follow.

chapters.zh: 他们得了启示，知道他们所传讲（原文是服事）的一切事，不是为自己，乃是为你们。那靠著从天上差来的圣灵传福音给你们的人，现在将这些事报给你们；天使也愿意详细察看这些事。
chapters.en: Unto whom it was revealed, that not unto themselves, but unto us they did minister the things, which are now reported unto you by them that have preached the gospel unto you with the Holy Ghost sent down from heaven; which things the angels desire to look into.

chapters.zh: 所以要约束你们的心，（原文是束上你们心中的腰），谨慎自守，专心盼望耶稣基督显现的时候所带来给你们的恩。
chapters.en: Wherefore gird up the loins of your mind, be sober, and hope to the end for the grace that is to be brought unto you at the revelation of Jesus Christ;

chapters.zh: 你们既作顺命的儿女，就不要效法从前蒙昧无知的时候那放纵私欲的样子。
chapters.en: As obedient children, not fashioning yourselves according to the former lusts in your ignorance:

chapters.zh: 那召你们的既是圣洁，你们在一切所行的事上也要圣洁。
chapters.en: But as he which hath called you is holy, so be ye holy in all manner of conversation;

chapters.zh: 因为经上记著说：「你们要圣洁，因为我是圣洁的。」
chapters.en: Because it is written, Be ye holy; for I am holy.

chapters.zh: 你们既称那不偏待人、按各人行为审判人的主为父，就当存敬畏的心度你们在世寄居的日子，
chapters.en: And if ye call on the Father, who without respect of persons judgeth according to every man's work, pass the time of your sojourning in fear:

chapters.zh: 知道你们得赎，脱去你们祖宗所传流虚妄的行为，不是凭著能坏的金银等物，
chapters.en: Forasmuch as ye know that ye were not redeemed with corruptible things, silver and gold, from your vain conversation by tradition from your fathers;

chapters.zh: 乃是凭著基督的宝血，如同无瑕疵、无玷污的羔羊之血。
chapters.en: But with the precious blood of Christ, as of a lamb without blemish and without spot:

chapters.zh: 基督在创世以前是预先被神知道的，却在这末世才为你们显现。
chapters.en: Who verily was foreordained before the foundation of the world, but was manifest in these last times for you,

chapters.zh: 你们也因著他，信那叫他从死里复活、又给他荣耀的神，叫你们的信心和盼望都在于神。
chapters.en: Who by him do believe in God, that raised him up from the dead, and gave him glory; that your faith and hope might be in God.

chapters.zh: 你们既因顺从真理，洁净了自己的心，以致爱弟兄没有虚假，就当从心里（从心里：有古卷是从清洁的心）彼此切实相爱。
chapters.en: Seeing ye have purified your souls in obeying the truth through the Spirit unto unfeigned love of the brethren, love one another with a pure heart fervently:

chapters.zh: 你们蒙了重生，不是由于能坏的种子，乃是由于不能坏的种子，是藉著神活泼常存的道。
chapters.en: Being born again, not of corruptible seed, but of incorruptible, by the word of God, which liveth and abideth for ever.

chapters.zh: 因为凡有血气的，尽都如草；他的美荣都像草上的花。草必枯干，花必凋谢；
chapters.en: For all flesh as grass, and all the glory of man as the flower of grass. The grass withereth, and the flower thereof falleth away:

chapters.zh: 惟有主的道是永存的。所传给你们的福音就是这道。
chapters.en: But the word of the Lord endureth for ever. And this is the word which by the gospel is preached unto you.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们既除去一切的恶毒（或译：阴毒）、诡诈，并假善、嫉妒，和一切毁谤的话，
chapters.en: Wherefore laying aside all malice, and all guile, and hypocrisies, and envies, and all evil speakings,

chapters.zh: 就要爱慕那纯净的灵奶，像才生的婴孩爱慕奶一样，叫你们因此渐长，以致得救。
chapters.en: As newborn babes, desire the sincere milk of the word, that ye may grow thereby:

chapters.zh: 你们若尝过主恩的滋味，就必如此。
chapters.en: If so be ye have tasted that the Lord gracious.

chapters.zh: 主乃活石，固然是被人所弃的，却是被神所拣选、所宝贵的。
chapters.en: To whom coming, a living stone, disallowed indeed of men, but chosen of God, precious,

chapters.zh: 你们来到主面前，也就像活石，被建造成为灵宫，作圣洁的祭司，藉著耶稣基督奉献神所悦纳的灵祭。
chapters.en: Ye also, as lively stones, are built up a spiritual house, an holy priesthood, to offer up spiritual sacrifices, acceptable to God by Jesus Christ.

chapters.zh: 因为经上说：看哪，我把所拣选、所宝贵的房角石安放在锡安；信靠他的人必不至于羞愧。
chapters.en: Wherefore also it is contained in the scripture, Behold, I lay in Sion a chief corner stone, elect, precious: and he that believeth on him shall not be confounded.

chapters.zh: 所以，他在你们信的人就为宝贵，在那不信的人有话说：匠人所弃的石头已作了房角的头块石头。
chapters.en: Unto you therefore which believe precious: but unto them which be disobedient, the stone which the builders disallowed, the same is made the head of the corner,

chapters.zh: 又说：作了绊脚的石头，跌人的磐石。他们既不顺从，就在道理上绊跌（或译：他们绊跌都因不顺从道理）；他们这样绊跌也是预定的。
chapters.en: And a stone of stumbling, and a rock of offence, which stumble at the word, being disobedient: whereunto also they were appointed.

chapters.zh: 惟有你们是被拣选的族类，是有君尊的祭司，是圣洁的国度，是属神的子民，要叫你们宣扬那召你们出黑暗入奇妙光明者的美德。
chapters.en: But ye a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, an holy nation, a peculiar people; that ye should shew forth the praises of him who hath called you out of darkness into his marvellous light:

chapters.zh: 你们从前算不得子民，现在却作了神的子民；从前未曾蒙怜恤，现在却蒙了怜恤。
chapters.en: Which in time past not a people, but now the people of God: which had not obtained mercy, but now have obtained mercy.

chapters.zh: 亲爱的弟兄阿，你们是客旅，是寄居的。我劝你们要禁戒肉体的私欲；这私欲是与灵魂争战的。
chapters.en: Dearly beloved, I beseech as strangers and pilgrims, abstain from fleshly lusts, which war against the soul;

chapters.zh: 你们在外邦人中，应当品行端正，叫那些毁谤你们是作恶的，因看见你们的好行为，便在鉴察（或作：眷顾）的日子归荣耀给神。
chapters.en: Having your conversation honest among the Gentiles: that, whereas they speak against you as evildoers, they may by good works, which they shall behold, glorify God in the day of visitation.

chapters.zh: 你们为主的缘故，要顺服人的一切制度，或是在上的君王，
chapters.en: Submit yourselves to every ordinance of man for the Lord's sake: whether it be to the king, as supreme;

chapters.zh: 或是君王所派罚恶赏善的臣宰。
chapters.en: Or unto governors, as unto them that are sent by him for the punishment of evildoers, and for the praise of them that do well.

chapters.zh: 因为神的旨意原是要你们行善，可以堵住那糊涂无知人的口。
chapters.en: For so is the will of God, that with well doing ye may put to silence the ignorance of foolish men:

chapters.zh: 你们虽是自由的，却不可藉著自由遮盖恶毒（或译：阴毒），总要作神的仆人。
chapters.en: As free, and not using liberty for a cloke of maliciousness, but as the servants of God.

chapters.zh: 务要尊敬众人，亲爱教中的弟兄，敬畏神，尊敬君王。
chapters.en: Honour all . Love the brotherhood. Fear God. Honour the king.

chapters.zh: 你们作仆人的，凡事要存敬畏的心顺服主人；不但顺服那善良温和的，就是那乖僻的也要顺服。
chapters.en: Servants, subject to masters with all fear; not only to the good and gentle, but also to the froward.

chapters.zh: 倘若人为叫良心对得住神，就忍受冤屈的苦楚，这是可喜爱的。
chapters.en: For this thankworthy, if a man for conscience toward God endure grief, suffering wrongfully.

chapters.zh: 你们若因犯罪受责打，能忍耐，有甚么可夸的呢？但你们若因行善受苦，能忍耐，这在神看是可喜爱的。
chapters.en: For what glory , if, when ye be buffeted for your faults, ye shall take it patiently? but if, when ye do well, and suffer , ye take it patiently, this acceptable with God.

chapters.zh: 你们蒙召原是为此；因基督也为你们受过苦，给你们留下榜样，叫你们跟随他的脚踪行。
chapters.en: For even hereunto were ye called: because Christ also suffered for us, leaving us an example, that ye should follow his steps:

chapters.zh: 他并没有犯罪，口里也没有诡诈。
chapters.en: Who did no sin, neither was guile found in his mouth:

chapters.zh: 他被骂不还口；受害不说威吓的话，只将自己交托那按公义审判人的主。
chapters.en: Who, when he was reviled, reviled not again; when he suffered, he threatened not; but committed to him that judgeth righteously:

chapters.zh: 他被挂在木头上，亲身担当了我们的罪，使我们既然在罪上死，就得以在义上活。因他受的鞭伤，你们便得了医治。
chapters.en: Who his own self bare our sins in his own body on the tree, that we, being dead to sins, should live unto righteousness: by whose stripes ye were healed.

chapters.zh: 你们从前好像迷路的羊，如今却归到你们灵魂的牧人监督了。
chapters.en: For ye were as sheep going astray; but are now returned unto the Shepherd and Bishop of your souls.

chapters.zh: 你们作妻子的要顺服自己的丈夫；这样，若有不信从道理的丈夫，他们虽然不听道，也可以因妻子的品行被感化过来；
chapters.en: Likewise, ye wives, in subjection to your own husbands; that, if any obey not the word, they also may without the word be won by the conversation of the wives;

chapters.zh: 这正是因看见你们有贞洁的品行和敬畏的心。
chapters.en: While they behold your chaste conversation with fear.

chapters.zh: 你们不要以外面的辫头发，戴金饰，穿美衣为妆饰，
chapters.en: Whose adorning let it not be that outward of plaiting the hair, and of wearing of gold, or of putting on of apparel;

chapters.zh: 只要以里面存著长久温柔、安静的心为妆饰；这在神面前是极宝贵的。
chapters.en: But the hidden man of the heart, in that which is not corruptible, of a meek and quiet spirit, which is in the sight of God of great price.

chapters.zh: 因为古时仰赖神的圣洁妇人正是以此为妆饰，顺服自己的丈夫，
chapters.en: For after this manner in the old time the holy women also, who trusted in God, adorned themselves, being in subjection unto their own husbands:

chapters.zh: 就如撒拉听从亚伯拉罕，称他为主。你们若行善，不因恐吓而害怕，便是撒拉的女儿了。
chapters.en: Even as Sara obeyed Abraham, calling him lord: whose daughters ye are, as long as ye do well, and are not afraid with any amazement.

chapters.zh: 你们作丈夫的，也要按情理（原文是知识）和妻子同住；因他比你软弱（比你软弱：原文作是软弱的器皿），与你一同承受生命之恩的，所以要敬重他。这样，便叫你们的祷告没有阻碍。
chapters.en: Likewise, ye husbands, dwell with according to knowledge, giving honour unto the wife, as unto the weaker vessel, and as being heirs together of the grace of life; that your prayers be not hindered.

chapters.zh: 总而言之，你们都要同心，彼此体恤，相爱如弟兄，存慈怜谦卑的心。
chapters.en: Finally, all of one mind, having compassion one of another, love as brethren, pitiful, courteous:

chapters.zh: 不以恶报恶，以辱骂还辱骂，倒要祝福；因你们是为此蒙召，好叫你们承受福气。
chapters.en: Not rendering evil for evil, or railing for railing: but contrariwise blessing; knowing that ye are thereunto called, that ye should inherit a blessing.

chapters.zh: 因为经上说：人若爱生命，愿享美福，须要禁止舌头不出恶言，嘴唇不说诡诈的话；
chapters.en: For he that will love life, and see good days, let him refrain his tongue from evil, and his lips that they speak no guile:

chapters.zh: 也要离恶行善，寻求和睦，一心追赶。
chapters.en: Let him eschew evil, and do good; let him seek peace, and ensue it.

chapters.zh: 因为，主的眼看顾义人；主的耳听他们的祈祷。惟有行恶的人，主向他们变脸。
chapters.en: For the eyes of the Lord over the righteous, and his ears unto their prayers: but the face of the Lord against them that do evil.

chapters.zh: 你们若是热心行善，有谁害你们呢？
chapters.en: And who he that will harm you, if ye be followers of that which is good?

chapters.zh: 你们就是为义受苦，也是有福的。不要怕人的威吓（的威吓：或译所怕的），也不要惊慌；
chapters.en: But and if ye suffer for righteousness' sake, happy : and be not afraid of their terror, neither be troubled;

chapters.zh: 只要心里尊主基督为圣。有人问你们心中盼望的缘由，就要常作准备，以温柔、敬畏的心回答各人；
chapters.en: But sanctify the Lord God in your hearts: and ready always to an answer to every man that asketh you a reason of the hope that is in you with meekness and fear:

chapters.zh: 存著无亏的良心，叫你们在何事上被毁谤，就在何事上可以叫那诬赖你们在基督里有好品行的人自觉羞愧。
chapters.en: Having a good conscience; that, whereas they speak evil of you, as of evildoers, they may be ashamed that falsely accuse your good conversation in Christ.

chapters.zh: 神的旨意若是叫你们因行善受苦，总强如因行恶受苦。
chapters.en: For better, if the will of God be so, that ye suffer for well doing, than for evil doing.

chapters.zh: 因基督也曾一次为罪受苦（有古卷作：受死），就是义的代替不义的，为要引我们到神面前。按著肉体说，他被治死；按著灵性说，他复活了。
chapters.en: For Christ also hath once suffered for sins, the just for the unjust, that he might bring us to God, being put to death in the flesh, but quickened by the Spirit:

chapters.zh: 他藉这灵曾去传道给那些在监狱里的灵听，
chapters.en: By which also he went and preached unto the spirits in prison;

chapters.zh: 就是那从前在挪亚预备方舟、神容忍等待的时候，不信从的人。当时进入方舟，藉著水得救的不多，只有八个人。
chapters.en: Which sometime were disobedient, when once the longsuffering of God waited in the days of Noah, while the ark was a preparing, wherein few, that is, eight souls were saved by water.

chapters.zh: 这水所表明的洗礼，现在藉著耶稣基督复活也拯救你们；这洗礼本不在乎除掉肉体的污秽，只求在神面前有无亏的良心。
chapters.en: The like figure whereunto baptism doth also now save us (not the putting away of the filth of the flesh, but the answer of a good conscience toward God,) by the resurrection of Jesus Christ:

chapters.zh: 耶稣已经进入天堂，在神的右边；众天使和有权柄的，并有能力的，都服从了他。
chapters.en: Who is gone into heaven, and is on the right hand of God; angels and authorities and powers being made subject unto him.

chapters.zh: 基督既在肉身受苦，你们也当将这样的心志作为兵器，因为在肉身受过苦的，就已经与罪断绝了。
chapters.en: Forasmuch then as Christ hath suffered for us in the flesh, arm yourselves likewise with the same mind: for he that hath suffered in the flesh hath ceased from sin;

chapters.zh: 你们存这样的心，从今以后就可以不从人的情欲，只从神的旨意在世度余下的光阴。
chapters.en: That he no longer should live the rest of time in the flesh to the lusts of men, but to the will of God.

chapters.zh: 因为往日随从外邦人的心意行邪淫、恶欲、醉酒、荒宴、群饮，并可恶拜偶像的事，时候已经够了。
chapters.en: For the time past of life may suffice us to have wrought the will of the Gentiles, when we walked in lasciviousness, lusts, excess of wine, revellings, banquetings, and abominable idolatries:

chapters.zh: 他们在这些事上，见你们不与他们同奔那放荡无度的路，就以为怪，毁谤你们。
chapters.en: Wherein they think it strange that ye run not with to the same excess of riot, speaking evil of :

chapters.zh: 他们必在那将要审判活人死人的主面前交账。
chapters.en: Who shall give account to him that is ready to judge the quick and the dead.

chapters.zh: 为此，就是死人也曾有福音传给他们，要叫他们的肉体按著人受审判，他们的灵性却靠神活著。
chapters.en: For for this cause was the gospel preached also to them that are dead, that they might be judged according to men in the flesh, but live according to God in the spirit.

chapters.zh: 万物的结局近了。所以，你们要谨慎自守，儆醒祷告。
chapters.en: But the end of all things is at hand: be ye therefore sober, and watch unto prayer.

chapters.zh: 最要紧的是彼此切实相爱，因为爱能遮掩许多的罪。
chapters.en: And above all things have fervent charity among yourselves: for charity shall cover the multitude of sins.

chapters.zh: 你们要互相款待，不发怨言。
chapters.en: Use hospitality one to another without grudging.

chapters.zh: 各人要照所得的恩赐彼此服事，作神百般恩赐的好管家。
chapters.en: As every man hath received the gift, minister the same one to another, as good stewards of the manifold grace of God.

chapters.zh: 若有讲道的，要按著神的圣言讲；若有服事人的，要按著神所赐的力量服事，叫神在凡事上因耶稣基督得荣耀。原来荣耀、权能都是他的，直到永永远远。阿们！
chapters.en: If any man speak, as the oracles of God; if any man minister, as of the ability which God giveth: that God in all things may be glorified through Jesus Christ, to whom be praise and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.

chapters.zh: 亲爱的弟兄阿，有火炼的试验临到你们，不要以为奇怪（似乎是遭遇非常的事），
chapters.en: Beloved, think it not strange concerning the fiery trial which is to try you, as though some strange thing happened unto you:

chapters.zh: 倒要欢喜；因为你们是与基督一同受苦，使你们在他荣耀显现的时候，也可以欢喜快乐。
chapters.en: But rejoice, inasmuch as ye are partakers of Christ's sufferings; that, when his glory shall be revealed, ye may be glad also with exceeding joy.

chapters.zh: 你们若为基督的名受辱骂，便是有福的；因为神荣耀的灵常住在你们身上。
chapters.en: If ye be reproached for the name of Christ, happy ; for the spirit of glory and of God resteth upon you: on their part he is evil spoken of, but on your part he is glorified.

chapters.zh: 你们中间却不可有人因为杀人、偷窃、作恶、好管闲事而受苦。
chapters.en: But let none of you suffer as a murderer, or a thief, or an evildoer, or as a busybody in other men's matters.

chapters.zh: 若为作基督徒受苦，却不要羞耻，倒要因这名归荣耀给神。
chapters.en: Yet if as a Christian, let him not be ashamed; but let him glorify God on this behalf.

chapters.zh: 因为时候到了，审判要从神的家起首。若是先从我们起首，那不信从神福音的人将有何等的结局呢？
chapters.en: For the time that judgment must begin at the house of God: and if first at us, what shall the end of them that obey not the gospel of God?

chapters.zh: 若是义人仅仅得救，那不虔敬和犯罪的人将有何地可站呢？
chapters.en: And if the righteous scarcely be saved, where shall the ungodly and the sinner appear?

chapters.zh: 所以，那照神旨意受苦的人要一心为善，将自己灵魂交与那信实的造化之主。
chapters.en: Wherefore let them that suffer according to the will of God commit the keeping of their souls in well doing, as unto a faithful Creator.

chapters.zh: 我这作长老、作基督受苦的见证、同享后来所要显现之荣耀的，劝你们中间与我同作长老的人：
chapters.en: The elders which are among you I exhort, who am also an elder, and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, and also a partaker of the glory that shall be revealed:

chapters.zh: 务要牧养在你们中间神的群羊，按著神旨意照管他们；不是出于勉强，乃是出于甘心；也不是因为贪财，乃是出于乐意；
chapters.en: Feed the flock of God which is among you, taking the oversight , not by constraint, but willingly; not for filthy lucre, but of a ready mind;

chapters.zh: 也不是辖制所托付你们的，乃是作群羊的榜样。
chapters.en: Neither as being lords over heritage, but being ensamples to the flock.

chapters.zh: 到了牧长显现的时候，你们必得那永不衰残的荣耀冠冕。
chapters.en: And when the chief Shepherd shall appear, ye shall receive a crown of glory that fadeth not away.

chapters.zh: 你们年幼的，也要顺服年长的。就是你们众人也都要以谦卑束腰，彼此顺服；因为神阻挡骄傲的人，赐恩给谦卑的人。
chapters.en: Likewise, ye younger, submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all be subject one to another, and be clothed with humility: for God resisteth the proud, and giveth grace to the humble.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们要自卑，服在神大能的手下，到了时候他必叫你们升高。
chapters.en: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time:

chapters.zh: 你们要将一切的忧虑卸给神，因为他顾念你们。
chapters.en: Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.

chapters.zh: 务要谨守，儆醒。因为你们的仇敌魔鬼，如同吼叫的狮子，遍地游行，寻找可吞吃的人。
chapters.en: Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the devil, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour:

chapters.zh: 你们要用坚固的信心抵挡他，因为知道你们在世上的众弟兄也是经历这样的苦难。
chapters.en: Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same afflictions are accomplished in your brethren that are in the world.

chapters.zh: 那赐诸般恩典的神曾在基督里召你们，得享他永远的荣耀，等你们暂受苦难之后，必要亲自成全你们，坚固你们，赐力量给你们。
chapters.en: But the God of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after that ye have suffered a while, make you perfect, stablish, strengthen, settle .

chapters.zh: 愿权能归给他，直到永永远远。阿们！
chapters.en: To him glory and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.

chapters.zh: 我略略的写了这信，托我所看为忠心的兄弟西拉转交你们，劝勉你们，又证明这恩是神的真恩。你们务要在这恩上站立得住。
chapters.en: By Silvanus, a faithful brother unto you, as I suppose, I have written briefly, exhorting, and testifying that this is the true grace of God wherein ye stand.

chapters.zh: 在巴比伦与你们同蒙拣选的教会问你们安。我儿子马可也问你们安。
chapters.en: The at Babylon, elected together with , saluteth you; and Marcus my son.

chapters.zh: 你们要用爱心彼此亲嘴问安。愿平安归与你们凡在基督里的人！
chapters.en: Greet ye one another with a kiss of charity. Peace with you all that are in Christ Jesus. Amen.
